text.title: terraform-modules-security Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for terraform-modules-security as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running terraform apply in CI without a manual approval gate for the production environment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An accidental merge to main or a misconfigured plan can destroy production resources without any human review. Always require a human approval step before production applies.
